name: Chocolate Cherry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chocolate wafer crumbs and melted butter. Press the mixture firmly into a 9-inch springform pan, covering the bottom and 2 1/2 inches up the sides. Chill.
2. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F.
3. In a heatproof bowl set over a double boiler, combine chocolate chips and heavy cream. Stir until the chocolate is melted and the mixture is smooth. Set aside.
4. In another large bowl, beat the softened cream cheese and sugar until creamy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Mix in the chocolate-cream mixture, cherry liqueur, and vanilla extract until blended.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared crust and bake at 325 degrees F for 60 minutes.
7. Turn off the oven and leave it with the door slightly ajar for 1 hour to cool gradually.
8. Remove from the oven and allow it to cool completely before refrigerating for 24 hours.
9. Spread cherry pie filling over the top of the cheesecake, leaving a 1-inch border around the edge. If desired, decorate the rim with whipped cream.
